ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county based on the latest census data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the precinct is located */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the precinct */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the precinct */,
  "voting_district" TEXT /* Voting district information of the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the candidate */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the candidate (active, inactive, or withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "voting_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the voting method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the election was held */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "election_day_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate on Election Day */,
  "advanced_voting_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate through Advanced Voting */,
  "absentee_by_mail_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate through Absentee by Mail */,
  "provisional_votes" INTEGER /* Number of provisional votes cast for the candidate */,
  "early_voting_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate through Early Voting */,
  "mail_in_ballot_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate through Mail-In Ballots */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast for the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter participation record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the precinct */,
  "participation_rate" REAL /* Voter participation rate in the precinct */,
  "registered_democrats" INTEGER /* Number of registered Democrats in the precinct */,
  "registered_republicans" INTEGER /* Number of registered Republicans in the precinct */,
  "democrat_turnout_rate" REAL /* Voter turnout rate among Democrats in the precinct */,
  "republican_turnout_rate" REAL /* Voter turnout rate among Republicans in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_participation_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the voters */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voters */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the voters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_demographics_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)
